payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden recessed-panel cabinet door with a raised frame and visible wood grain; matte, slightly worn finish with no obvious handle and a small darker recess at the top; image shows the door photographed from close range and appears slightly edge-cropped on the right (approx. 0.6 m away).

message.content: {"label":"cabinet","short_description":"dark brown recessed-panel cabinet door","long_description":"Dark brown wooden recessed-panel cabinet door with a raised frame and visible wood grain; matte, slightly worn finish with no obvious handle and a small darker recess at the top; image shows the door photographed from close range and appears slightly edge-cropped on the right (approx. 0.6 m away).","attributes":["dark brown","wooden","recessed panel","raised frame","visible wood grain","matte finish","minor surface wear","no visible handle","edge-cropped (right)","vertical orientation"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
